response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content, which is a static slideshow with background music. 2. Listened carefully to the audio to determine if there are any vocal tracks; concluded that the background music is entirely instrumental and no singing occurs. 3. Segmented the video into scenes based on the visual transitions of the slides. 4. Since no vocal music was detected, all scenes are marked as containing no vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video slideshow presenting various fan-submitted messages for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert by Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis, accompanied by instrumental background music throughout the duration. No vocal music is present.

scenes.description: The first scene shows the opening fan message collection for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert. Background music is purely instrumental.
The screen changes to display the concert title and an announcement. Still no vocal music.
An 'Attention' slide for concert visitors is displayed. Instrumental music continues.
A slide detailing concert merchandise is shown. Instrumental music continues.
The video cycles through more pages of fan messages. Instrumental music continues.
The sequence of fan messages repeats, starting from the first image. Instrumental music continues.
The concert title and announcement slide appears again. Instrumental music continues.
The visitor attention slide appears again. Instrumental music continues.
The merchandise detail slide appears again. Instrumental music continues.
The final sequence of fan messages concludes the video. Instrumental music plays until the end.
